title: Light mode now looks right everywhere
description: Creator and Campaign detail panels used to open in the opposite theme to the rest of the app, so in light mode you'd get a black panel over a white page. Parts of them stayed dark regardless of your theme — the talent payment editor and the outreach log were unreadable in light mode, and hovering a campaign row left it stuck black. Everything now follows the theme you've picked.

title: Cancel your plan or close your account, from inside HQue
description: Settings → Billing now has a Danger zone. Cancel my plan stops the billing at the end of the period you've paid for and keeps all your data — with a Resume button if you change your mind. Close this account locks the workspace and cancels billing straight away, but nothing is deleted for 30 days: until then the owner can restore everything with one click. Both are owner-only.

title: Option to hide Workspace Band list on mobile view
description: On a phone, the brand/client list used to sit in a fixed column next to your board, leaving the board squeezed into a sliver. The workspace now drills down instead: the brand list fills the screen, you tap a brand, and the board gets the whole screen — with a Brands button to go back. Desktop is unchanged.

title: Add definitions of roles
description: Settings → Team now explains what Owner, Admin, and Member each can do, so you know exactly what you're handing someone before you invite them.

title: Only the account owner can change or cancel your plan
description: Billing is now owner-only. Admins can still run the workspace — invite people, change roles, edit agency info — but they can no longer change your plan, update the card, or cancel the account. Anyone else who lands on the trial-ended or payment-failed screen is simply told which owner to ask.

title: Marketing pages now open correctly
description: Fixed an issue where clicking Pricing, The Pitch, Privacy, or Terms could send you back to the home page instead of opening the page. Every public link now goes straight to the right page.

title: hque now shows up on Google, AI search, and shared links
description: Our public pages — homepage, pricing, FAQ, blog, and every blog post — are now fully readable by Google, ChatGPT, and other AI assistants, with unique titles, descriptions, and a branded preview image when you share a link. Your logged-in workspace stays private and out of search.

title: Compare plans at a glance
description: The pricing page now has a full feature-by-feature comparison table across Starter, Pro, and Business, so you can see exactly what each plan includes before you choose.

title: Branded login page for your agency
description: Your agency now has its own sign-in page at h-que.com/your-workspace — showing your own logo instead of HQue. Find and copy your link in Settings → Agency Info.

title: White-label your workspace (Business plan)
description: On the Business plan, your own logo replaces HQue across your workspace once you're signed in. Upload your logo in Settings → Agency Info.

title: Add your logo when you subscribe
description: When you start a paid plan, you're prompted to upload your agency logo so your branding is ready from day one.
